summary: Recent updates to the Media IPC (Inter-Process Communication) area of Firefox introduce a new method for handling specific media properties by utilizing **ContiguousEnumSerializerInclusive** with the MediaDataDecoder. This change enhances the way the browser communicates between processes when decoding media, making it more efficient and reliable. Improved communication in media decoding can lead to better playback performance and a smoother user experience when streaming video or audio content. These changes are important for maintaining high-quality media playback and ensuring compatibility with various media formats.
